name: Bapcor Limited
analysis: BAP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 91% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.4650, stop A$0.3985, target A$0.5900 (1.88:1) — then trail it.
